title: origanum integrum
intro: Origanum integrum, also known as the sweet marjoram, is a perennial herb belonging to the Lamiaceae family. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Origanum integrum include relief from anxiety and stress, improved sleep quality, and reduced symptoms of digestive issues such as bloating and gas. Herbal preparations of Origanum integrum include teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to promote relaxation and ease respiratory problems.
